task: D-2 - Google Business Profile, Citations, And Business Fact Approval

official_sources.title: Guidelines for representing your business on Google
official_sources.used_for: GBP eligibility, real-world name, address/service-area, phone, hours, categories, duplicate profile, and hybrid service-area rules

official_sources.title: Edit your Business Profile
official_sources.used_for: Required profile fields and verified profile edit/readback expectations

limitations: No GBP account/location ID, owner evidence, dashboard screenshot/export, API credential, or sanitized profile export was available.
GBP facts cannot be treated as approved from website source values or public citation snippets.
Do not add LocalBusiness aggregateRating, review schema, sameAs links, extra locations, categories, or special hours until owner/platform evidence is supplied.

conflicts_or_limits: Raw homepage HTML scan only exposed the Figma Make shell and did not expose NAP/hours before JavaScript rendering.
Public snippets do not approve GBP fields, citations, categories, photos, services, reviews, or special hours.
Email shown as info.mitra.auto@gmail.com instead of repo contact@mitra-auto.fi.
Weekday hours shown as 08:30-18:00 instead of repo 09:00-18:00.
Review count, AC permit, loan car, cafe/waiting-room, and warranty-like claims require owner proof before reuse.
Public snippet shows info.mitra.auto@gmail.com and weekday 08:30-18:00.
Staff count and service-area claims require owner confirmation.
Other name/alias appears as Espoon rengas ja autohuolto and needs owner decision.
Registry-style source does not approve GBP operational fields or customer-facing hours.
Several snippets show info.mitra.auto@gmail.com instead of contact@mitra-auto.fi.
AutoJerry path/alias references Espoon rengas ja autohuolto.
Snippet evidence is not an owner-approved citation export and must be verified before corrections are marked complete.

source_findings.title: GBP owner/profile readback unavailable
source_findings.evidence: No GBP account/location metadata, owner evidence, verification status, categories, services/products, photos, reviews, duplicate/suspension status, or appointment URL was available.
source_findings.impact: Local SEO, GBP optimization, LocalBusiness schema expansion, review policy, and citation approval cannot be called ready.
source_findings.required_resolution: Provide sanitized GBP dashboard/API evidence and owner approval.

source_findings.title: Public citation NAP conflicts remain unresolved
source_findings.evidence: Repo uses contact@mitra-auto.fi and 09:00 weekday opening; public citation surfaces show info.mitra.auto@gmail.com and 08:30 weekday opening.
source_findings.impact: Google may reconcile inconsistent business facts from the website, GBP, and citations; users may contact the wrong address or arrive at the wrong time.
source_findings.required_resolution: Choose canonical public email and true customer-facing hours, then update website, GBP, and citations consistently.

source_findings.title: Alias/brand relationship is unresolved
source_findings.evidence: Taloustutka and AutoJerry-style public evidence references Espoon rengas ja autohuolto as an alias or path around business ID 3408833-8.
source_findings.impact: Brand/entity consistency and citation cleanup cannot pass until the owner decides whether this is historical, valid DBA, or stale citation data.
source_findings.required_resolution: Approve naming policy and update or document citations.

source_findings.title: Raw production HTML still hides local business facts
source_findings.evidence: Live homepage curl body scan exposed Created in Figma Make and Mitra Auto, but did not expose address, phone, email, or hours in raw HTML.
source_findings.impact: Crawler and AI/local proof extraction depend on rendered JavaScript until production raw HTML/edge metadata parity is fixed.
source_findings.required_resolution: Serve route-specific raw HTML/metadata/schema/NAP or edge-injected content for launch-critical local pages.

source_findings.title: Footer social links are generic placeholders
source_findings.evidence: src/components/site/layout/Footer.tsx links to facebook.com, twitter.com, instagram.com, and linkedin.com without owner-approved profile URLs.
source_findings.impact: Generic social links weaken trust and must not be used as sameAs evidence.
source_findings.required_resolution: Remove social links or replace only with owner-approved official profiles.

source_findings.title: Visible review/rating/customer-count claims remain unapproved
source_findings.evidence: src/i18n/dictionaries/common.ts and src/i18n/dictionaries/site.ts contain rating, review, and 500+ customer claims; LocalBusiness aggregateRating/review schema is not emitted, which is correct until proof exists.
source_findings.impact: Trust claims cannot be treated as local proof or promoted in schema until provenance and legal/content approval exist.
source_findings.required_resolution: Provide review/customer-count provenance or remove/soften claims in D-5.

owner_evidence_required: Owner-approved public name, legal name, business ID, address, service area, phone, canonical email, website URL, booking URL, regular hours, and special-hours process.

GBP account ID, location ID, owner, backup owner, verification state, profile name, primary category, additional categories, address/pin, service area, phone, website, appointment URL, services/products, attributes, messaging, photos, reviews, duplicate/suspension status, and last update timestamp.
Citation cleanup evidence for Google, Apple Maps, Bing Places, Finder, Fonecta, AutoJerry, autokorjaamo.fi, Rengasvertailu, Facebook, and automotive/service directories.
Review request/response SOP with no gating, incentive, copied-review, or self-serving schema policy.
Official social profile URLs or owner decision to remove social links.
Decision on Espoon rengas ja autohuolto alias/history and how it should appear in citations.

implementation_policy.reason: No NAP, schema, social, review, rating, hours, category, or citation corrections should be committed without owner-approved source facts.

verification.command:
source ~/.config/projects/bin/project && project mitraauto >/dev/null && if [ -n "${GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS:-}" ]; then gac_status=set; else gac_status=missing; fi && printf 'PROJECT_SLUG=%s
PROJECT_DIR=%s
PUBLIC_BASE_URL=%s
GOOGLE_BUSINESS_PROFILE_ACCOUNT=%s
GOOGLE_BUSINESS_PROFILE_LOCATION=%s
GBP_ACCOUNT_ID=%s
GBP_LOCATION_ID=%s
GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=%s
' "$PROJECT_SLUG" "$PROJECT_DIR" "${PUBLIC_BASE_URL:-missing}" "${GOOGLE_BUSINESS_PROFILE_ACCOUNT:-missing}" "${GOOGLE_BUSINESS_PROFILE_LOCATION:-missing}" "${GBP_ACCOUNT_ID:-missing}" "${GBP_LOCATION_ID:-missing}" "$gac_status"
verification.notes: Project wrapper loaded the Mitra project but GBP and Google credential metadata were missing.

verification.command: curl -sS --max-time 20 https://www.mitra-auto.fi/ | tr '\n' ' ' | rg -o 'Mitra Auto|Hankasuontie 5|00390 Helsinki|contact@mitra-auto\.fi|info\.mitra\.auto@gmail\.com|\+358 40 777 7163|040 777 7163|09:00|08:30|Created in Figma Make' | sort | uniq -c
verification.notes: Raw homepage HTML exposed Figma Make shell and brand text, but not address, email, phone, or hours.
Repo uses contact@mitra-auto.fi, has no old Gmail source value, and still contains proof-sensitive review/rating/customer-count/social-placeholder findings.

decision: D-2 is complete as a GBP/citation/business-fact evidence gate. It is not a local SEO pass. Local readiness remains blocked until owner-approved GBP evidence, citation corrections, canonical NAP/hours/email decisions, review/social proof, and production raw HTML/local schema parity are supplied and reconciled.
next_required_task: D-3 - Merchant Center Feed Diagnostics And Product Policy Approval
